experience.description: Provided bedside care in the general medical ward. Participated in hospital quality improvement committees and learned how the operations side works.
Worked in the geriatric unit focusing on long-term care patients and aging populations. Got involved in memory care program design and quality improvement initiatives for elderly patients.

sop: After four years of bedside nursing — two in general wards and two in the geriatric unit at Apollo — I want to move into managing long-term care facilities. Working with aging populations has been the most meaningful part of my career so far. I got really interested in memory care program design and how quality improvement can make a real difference for elderly patients. I want to take my clinical knowledge and apply it to the management and operations side of long-term care.
